title: Read stream file -> modify -> Write stream file
author: bluedge
body:
Hi,
First off all thanks for this wonderful module. It is really appreciated!
I'm having a really hard time to do the following : 
- 1) Stream an existing workbook with WorkbookReader (this excel file can be considered as a template)
- 2) Make some change in an existing worksheet, say replace a simple cell value.
- 3) Stream the modified workbook with WorkbookWriter to a new destination file

A simple working example would be absolutely fantastic to get us started with the streaming functions of the module. Probably one of the most promising feature!

comments.author: kishan-gajjar
comments.body: @bluedge I am trying to do the same but not getting any proper tutorials to start with. If you have implemented it then kindly help me. Thanks

comments.author: bluedge
comments.body:
It doesn't seem to be possible really. The option I took is to stream everything form zero.
This question on stackoverflow was a good starting point. http://stackoverflow.com/questions/35272928/creating-transform-stream-using-exceljs-for-writing-xlsx

comments.author: BenjaminDish
